---
title: "Writing Samples"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
---


<style>
.sample-card {
  border: 1px solid #444;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: transform 0.2s;
  background-color: #222;
  height: 100%;
}
.sample-card:hover {
  transform: scale(1.03);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(255,105,180,0.3);
  border-color: #ff69b4;
}
.sample-img {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}
.sample-title {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1.1em;
  color: #eee;
  display: block;
  margin-top: 10px;
}
.sample-link {
  text-decoration: none !important;
}
</style>

<div class="row">

  <!-- Sample 1 -->
  <div class="col-md-6 col-sm-12">
    <a href="sample_agency.html" class="sample-link">
      <div class="sample-card">
        <img src="thumb_agency.png" class="sample-img" alt="Agency Policies">
        <span class="sample-title">Police Agency Policies and Level of Force</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- Sample 2 -->
  <div class="col-md-6 col-sm-12">
    <a href="sample_lda.html" class="sample-link">
      <div class="sample-card">
        <img src="thumb_lda.png" class="sample-img" alt="LDA Analysis">
        <span class="sample-title">LDA Analysis of Online News</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="row" style="margin-top: 20px;">

  <!-- Sample 3 -->
  <div class="col-md-6 col-sm-12">
    <a href="sample_replication.html" class="sample-link">
      <div class="sample-card">
        <img src="thumb_replication.png" class="sample-img" alt="Replication Study">
        <span class="sample-title">Social Science Replication Study</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- Sample 4 -->
  <div class="col-md-6 col-sm-12">
    <a href="sample_problem_set.html" class="sample-link">
      <div class="sample-card">
        <img src="thumb_problem_set.png" class="sample-img" alt="Problem Set">
        <span class="sample-title">Data Visualization Problem Set</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>

</div>
